title: Portuguese Date Pudding
description: A rich and creamy dessert with a hint of savory from the tahini paste, inspired by traditional Portuguese custard tarts.
instructions: In a blender, puree the dates until smooth.
In a medium saucepan, whisk together the heavy cream, granulated sugar, and cornstarch.
Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens.
Remove from heat and whisk in the tahini paste, savory spice blend, and melted butter.
Stir in the date puree until well combined.
Pour the mixture into 6 small ramekins or custard cups.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until set.
Serve warm or chilled, garnished with additional dates if desired.
